hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】“毫无说服力的反弹”：随着企业资金需求下降和阻力增加，比特币 ETF 出现 6.3 亿美元的资金流出；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席；【FINANCE】交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%。

items.title: ‘Rally without conviction’: Bitcoin ETFs see $630M in outflows as corporate treasury demand drops and resistance builds
items.summary: Bitcoin ETFs posted $630M in outflows on May 13 as corporate treasury buying slumps and a $2B gamma cluster threatens volatility near $82K.
items.title_zh: “毫无说服力的反弹”：随着企业资金需求下降和阻力增加，比特币 ETF 出现 6.3 亿美元的资金流出
items.summary_zh: 5 月 13 日，比特币 ETF 出现 6.3 亿美元的资金流出，原因是企业财务购买量下降，且 20 亿美元的伽玛簇威胁着接近 8.2 万美元的波动性。

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 在有史以来最具争议性的美联储主席投票中，56 岁的沃什获得确认接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔 (Jerome Powell)。

items.title: Traders believe inflation could near 5% this year
items.summary: Prediction market traders see two-in-three odds that inflation will go above 4.5% this year, and nearly 40% odds that prices will accelerate above 5%.
items.title_zh: 交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%
items.summary_zh: 预测市场交易者认为今年通胀率将超过 4.5% 的可能性为三分之二，而物价将加速超过 5% 的可能性接近 40%。

items.title: Strive’s SATA to become first U.S. listed security to pay daily cash dividends
items.summary: The daily payout structure lifts the effective yield to 13.88% as the company eliminates all debt and expands its bitcoin treasury strategy.
items.title_zh: 力争SATA成为首家每日派发现金股息的美国上市证券
items.summary_zh: 随着公司消除所有债务并扩大其比特币金库策略，每日支付结构将有效收益率提高至 13.88%。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
items.summary: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在中国：交易员预测关税休战将延长并购买波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 交易员还认为，总统很可能会谈论伊朗问题，尽管他表示美国不需要中国帮助解决战争。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.summary_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title: 'They shot my neighbour in the head' - the lakeside city traumatised by war
items.summary: Rebel fighters and Rwandan troops are accused of committing atrocities after capturing the DR Congo city of Uvira in December.
items.title_zh: “他们开枪射中我邻居的头”——这座饱受战争创伤的湖滨城市
items.summary_zh: 叛军战士和卢旺达军队被指控在 12 月占领刚果民主共和国城市乌维拉后犯下暴行。

items.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 22 people, health ministry says
items.summary: Eight children are among those reported dead after a series of air strikes hit the south of Beirut.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部称以色列空袭造成22人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，贝鲁特南部遭受一系列空袭后，有八名儿童死亡。

items.title: Gunshots fired in Philippine Senate where lawmaker wanted by ICC is holed up
items.summary: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, a former police chief, enforced former President Rodrigo Duterte's deadly drug war.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾参议院发生枪击事件，国际刑事法院通缉的议员躲藏其中
items.summary_zh: 前警察局长、参议员罗纳德·德拉罗莎执行了前总统罗德里戈·杜特尔特的致命反毒战争。

items.title: Key Moments From the First Day of Trump’s China Visit
items.summary: During the first round of two days of talks, Xi Jinping issued a stern warning about Taiwan while Trump touted all the top business leaders in his delegation.
items.title_zh: 特朗普访华首日的关键时刻
items.summary_zh: 在为期两天的第一轮会谈中，习近平对台湾发出了严厉警告，而特朗普则吹捧了其代表团中的所有商界领袖。

items.title: Duterte Ally Flees to Evade I.C.C. Arrest Warrant After Chaos at Philippine Senate
items.summary: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court in The Hague, had been holed up in the building when shots rang out.
items.title_zh: 杜特尔特盟友逃离国际刑事法院菲律宾参议院混乱后发出逮捕令
items.summary_zh: 枪声响起时，被海牙国际刑事法院通缉的参议员罗纳德·德拉·罗莎正躲在大楼里。

items.title: Russia Pummels Kyiv After Putin Hints That War Could End Soon
items.summary: At least five people were killed and dozens were wounded in a drone and missile strike, the latest in a series of attacks since a three-day truce expired on Monday.
items.title_zh: 普京暗示战争可能很快结束后，俄罗斯猛烈打击基辅
items.summary_zh: 无人机和导弹袭击造成至少五人死亡、数十人受伤，这是自周一为期三天的休战结束以来一系列袭击中的最新一起。

items.title: China Restores Beef Trade With U.S. as Goodwill Gesture for Trump Visit
items.summary: Beijing approved export licenses for hundreds of American slaughterhouses to resume beef shipments, ending a 15-month ban.
items.title_zh: 中国恢复与美国牛肉贸易作为特朗普访问的善意姿态
items.summary_zh: 北京批准了数百家美国屠宰场的出口许可证，以恢复牛肉运输，结束了长达 15 个月的禁令。

items.title: Stablecoin-powered neobank Fasset raises $51 million to expand across emerging markets
items.summary: The Shariah-compliant digital bank is part of a growing wave of fintech startups building banking and payments services on top of blockchain and stablecoin rails.
items.title_zh: 由稳定币驱动的 Neobank Fasset 筹集了 5100 万美元，用于在新兴市场进行扩张
items.summary_zh: 这家符合伊斯兰教法的数字银行是越来越多的金融科技初创公司在区块链和稳定币轨道上构建银行和支付服务的浪潮的一部分。

items.title: Bank of England ready to water down 'overly conservative' stablecoin proposals: FT
items.summary: Restrictions proposed by the BOE prompted criticism from the crypto industry, which said they risked preventing the U.K. from being competitive in the digital economy.
items.title_zh: 英国《金融时报》：英国央行准备淡化“过于保守”的稳定币提案
items.summary_zh: 英国央行提出的限制引发了加密行业的批评，加密行业表示，这些限制可能会阻碍英国在数字经济中的竞争力。

items.title: Bank of England set to ease sterling stablecoin rules amid industry concerns: FT
items.summary: Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden said the central bank is "looking very hard" at re-examining its proposed stablecoin rules.
items.title_zh: 由于业界担忧，英国央行将放宽英镑稳定币规则：FT
items.summary_zh: 副行长萨拉·布里登表示，央行正在“非常努力地”重新审查其拟议的稳定币规则。

items.title: BitGo doubles revenue to $3.8 billion but net loss widens in Q1
items.summary: The NYSE-listed crypto infrastructure firm generated $3.8 billion in revenue in the first quarter, up 112.6% year-on-year.
items.title_zh: BitGo 收入翻倍至 38 亿美元，但第一季度净亏损扩大
items.summary_zh: 这家在纽约证券交易所上市的加密基础设施公司第一季度实现收入 38 亿美元，同比增长 112.6%。

items.title: Solana treasury firm DeFi Development Corp reports 108% yearly growth in SOL per share
items.summary: DeFi Development Corp attributed the growth to 'unconventional' strategies that aligned the company better with the Solana ecosystem.

items.summary_zh: DeFi Development Corp 将增长归因于“非常规”战略，使公司更好地与 Solana 生态系统保持一致。

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
items.title_zh: 参数高尔夫教会了我们关于人工智能辅助研究的哪些知识

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率如何在 2026 年初扩大
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
items.summary: The U.S. Treasury Secretary also said President Donald Trump would likely comment on the Taiwan issue in coming days.
items.title_zh: 贝森特告诉 CNBC，随着各国计划安全协议，美国可以与中国举行人工智能谈判，因为“我们处于领先地位”
items.summary_zh: 美国财政部长还表示，唐纳德·特朗普总统可能会在未来几天就台湾问题发表评论。

items.title: Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid 'Thucydides Trap' at high-stakes summit
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.
items.title_zh: 习近平问特朗普中美能否在高风险峰会上避免“修昔底德陷阱”
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周四上午在北京会见了中国国家主席习近平，开始了持续到周五的高风险峰会。

items.title: Jensen Huang joins Trump's China trip after the U.S. president called the Nvidia CEO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker executive was not included in earlier lists of business leaders participating in President Donald Trump's trip to China this week.
items.title_zh: 在美国总统致电英伟达首席执行官后，黄仁勋参加了特朗普的中国之行
items.summary_zh: 这位美国芯片制造商高管并未出现在早些时候参加唐纳德·特朗普总统本周访华的商界领袖名单中。

items.title: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将带十几名美国高管前往中国。黄仁勋不是其中之一
items.summary_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋不会参加特朗普的中国之行，但其他十几位美国高管却参加了。

items.title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
items.summary: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.
items.title_zh: 特朗普准备本周会见中国习近平，亚洲有五件事值得关注
items.summary_zh: 美国和中国国家主席定于周四和周五在北京举行为期一周的外交会议。

items.title: Series of court decisions weaken Democrats' odds of winning the House
items.summary: A U.S. Supreme Court decision and ruling from the Virginia Supreme Court have altered the redistricting outlook, hurting the chance that House control will flip.
items.title_zh: 一系列法院判决削弱了民主党赢得众议院的可能性
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院的一项决定和弗吉尼亚州最高法院的裁决改变了选区重新划分的前景，损害了众议院控制权翻转的机会。

items.title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
items.summary: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.
items.title_zh: 特朗普欢迎中国的到来，但棘手问题依然存在
items.summary_zh: 在美国总统访问北京期间，世界两个超级大国的领导人在镜头前笑容满面。

items.title: Former Nigerian minister sentenced to 75 years in rare corruption verdict
items.summary: Former Power Minister Saleh Mamman was convicted last week - but the authorities do not know his whereabouts.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚前部长因罕见腐败案被判 75 年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 前电力部长萨利赫·马曼上周被定罪，但当局不知道他的下落。

items.title: Latvian PM resigns after row over stray Ukrainian drones
items.summary: Drones bound for Russia crashed down in Latvia last week, prompting a political fallout.
items.title_zh: 拉脱维亚总理因乌克兰无人机失控而辞职
items.summary_zh: 上周，飞往俄罗斯的无人机在拉脱维亚坠毁，引发了政治影响。

items.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
items.summary: A girl is among at least seven killed in Ukraine's capital in massive Russian drone and missile attacks, officials say.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯大规模袭击后，乌克兰救援人员从基辅公寓的废墟中救出死亡
items.summary_zh: 官员称，乌克兰首都在大规模俄罗斯无人机和导弹袭击中至少七人丧生，其中包括一名女孩。

items.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
items.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
items.title_zh: 法院推翻亚历克斯·默多的谋杀定罪并下令重新审判
items.summary_zh: 法院已下令对 2021 年 6 月保罗·默多 (Paul Murdaugh) 和玛吉·默多 (Maggie Murdaugh) 被杀事件进行新的审判。

items.title: Cuba has run out of diesel and oil, energy minister says
items.summary: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.
items.title_zh: 古巴能源部长称柴油和石油已耗尽
items.summary_zh: 这位部长表示，古巴的局势“极其紧张”，因为美国主导的对该国石油封锁导致大范围断电。

items.title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
items.summary: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.
items.title_zh: 接触汉坦病毒后，一名妇女在南太平洋英国岛屿上被隔离
items.summary_zh: 英国海外领土皮特凯恩群岛政府表示，在一艘受病毒袭击的船上的妇女“没有任何生病的迹象”。

items.title: Elon Musk Returns to Trump’s Side in Beijing
items.summary: Mr. Musk is part of a delegation of business leaders to China, where his interests include Tesla’s electric vehicle factory and solar panels.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克在北京重返特朗普身边
items.summary_zh: 马斯克是访问中国的商界领袖代表团的一员，他的兴趣包括特斯拉的电动汽车工厂和太阳能电池板。

items.title: Inside the Secret Mission to Fly Taiwan’s President to Africa
items.summary: From satellite phone check-ins to a borrowed royal plane, new details show how Taiwan’s leader’s team outwitted China and pulled off an audacious journey to southern Africa.
items.title_zh: 台湾总统飞往非洲的秘密任务
items.summary_zh: 从卫星电话报到到借来的皇家飞机，新的细节展示了台湾领导人的团队如何智胜中国，并完成了一次大胆的南部非洲之旅。

items.title: Argentina Races To Find Origin of Hantavirus Outbreak
items.summary: The scientific investigation into the origin of cruise infection has become entangled with international finger pointing.
items.title_zh: 阿根廷竞相寻找汉坦病毒爆发的源头
items.summary_zh: 对邮轮感染起源的科学调查已与国际社会的指责纠缠在一起。

items.title: Cecilia Flores Became the Voice of Mexican Mothers
items.summary: One of the most prominent activists for Mexico’s disappeared recently found the remains of one missing son. Now she has turned her attention to finding the other.
items.title_zh: 塞西莉亚·弗洛雷斯 (Cecilia Flores) 成为墨西哥母亲的代言人
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥失踪事件最著名的活动人士之一最近发现了一名失踪儿子的遗骸。现在她把注意力转向寻找另一个。

items.title: Judge Orders U.S. to Return Colombian Woman Deported to Congo
items.summary: The unusual ruling came after the judge found that the Trump administration had most likely violated the law by deporting the 55-year-old woman to the African country despite its refusal to take her.
items.title_zh: 法官命令美国遣返被驱逐到刚果的哥伦比亚妇女
items.summary_zh: 这项不同寻常的裁决是在法官发现特朗普政府将这名 55 岁女性驱逐到非洲国家（尽管该国拒绝接收她）的行为很可能违反法律之后作出的。

items.title: The Lecturer and Philosopher King: Xi Jinping Behind Closed Doors
items.summary: Encounters with other world leaders reveal a side of China’s leader that the public rarely sees, and offer clues to how he will approach President Trump in Beijing.
items.title_zh: 讲师哲学家王：闭门的习近平
items.summary_zh: 与其他世界领导人的会面揭示了中国领导人鲜为人知的一面，并为他将如何在北京与特朗普总统接触提供线索。

items.title: BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility
items.summary: A new credit facility by Grove aims to allow instant redemptions into stablecoins from BlackRock's BUIDL and Janus Henderson's money market funds, reducing settlement time from days to instantaneous.
items.title_zh: BlackRock、Janus Henderson 代币化基金通过新的 10 亿美元设施获得即时赎回
items.summary_zh: Grove 的一项新信贷安排旨在允许从 BlackRock 的 BUIDL 和 Janus Henderson 的货币市场基金即时赎回稳定币，将结算时间从几天缩短为即时。

items.title: Coinbase backs Hyperliquid stablecoin push as DeFi trading volumes climb
items.summary: Coinbase will manage USDC liquidity on Hyperliquid, deepening ties with one of crypto’s fastest-growing trading platforms.
items.title_zh: 随着 DeFi 交易量的攀升，Coinbase 支持 Hyperliquid 稳定币的发展
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 将在 Hyperliquid 上管理 USDC 流动性，加深与加密货币增长最快的交易平台之一的联系。

items.title: Bullish misses first-quarter revenue estimates on weaker crypto trading activity
items.summary: The company also missed bottom-line forecasts; shares were down nearly 8% in pre-market trading.
items.title_zh: 由于加密货币交易活动疲弱，看涨未达到第一季度收入预期
items.summary_zh: 该公司还未能达到盈利预期；盘前交易中股价下跌近 8%。

items.title: GSR legal chief puts Clarity Act passage below 50% odds, citing stablecoin yield and ethics concerns
items.summary: GSR's Joshua Riezman gave the Clarity Act below-50% odds of passing this Senate session, citing stablecoin yield and ethics concerns.
items.title_zh: GSR 法律负责人表示，《澄清法案》通过的可能性低于 50%，理由是稳定币收益率和道德问题
items.summary_zh: GSR 的约书亚·里兹曼 (Joshua Riezman) 给出的明确法案在本次参议院会议上通过的可能性低于 50%，理由是稳定币收益率和道德问题。

items.title: Coinbase becomes Hyperliquid’s official USDC treasury deployer as USDH sunsets
items.summary: Native Markets, the operator of Hyperliquid's USDH stablecoin, agreed to grant Coinbase the right to purchase USDH brand assets.
items.title_zh: 随着 USDH 的退出，Coinbase 成为 Hyperliquid 的官方 USDC 金库部署者
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid USDH 稳定币的运营商 Native Markets 同意授予 Coinbase 购买 USDH 品牌资产的权利。

items.title: Tether, TRON and TRM Labs-backed T3 Financial Crime Unit tops $450 million in frozen illicit crypto assets
items.summary: T3 FCU says it has now frozen over $450 million in illicit crypto assets, reporting a 43.9% annual increase in intercepted proceeds.
items.title_zh: Tether、TRON 和 TRM Labs 支持的 T3 金融犯罪部门冻结非法加密资产超过 4.5 亿美元
items.summary_zh: T3 FCU 表示，目前已冻结超过 4.5 亿美元的非法加密资产，截获的收益每年增长 43.9%。

items.title: CFTC issues blanket no-action letter on prediction markets, relieving swap data reporting duties
items.summary: The CFTC published the no-action letter to remove uncertainty regarding event contracts, which technically qualify as swaps.
items.title_zh: CFTC 对预测市场发出全面不采取行动信函，免除掉期数据报告职责
items.summary_zh: CFTC 发布了不采取行动函，以消除事件合约的不确定性，从技术上讲，事件合约属于掉期合约。

items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
